name: Brody P.
title: Storm Spotter/Weather Watcher
bio: I have a very deep passion and love for all things weather.

name: Greg B
title: -Storm Spotter/Weather Watcher
bio: I’ve always been reporting and chasing on the side when I am able. Some days I feel like I’m running the #STLWX page on Twitter/X . I think it would be a really fun opportunity to work with a team covering whatever Mother Nature throws at us.
